bird.name: 玉山噪鹛
bird.summary: 金翼白眉（学名：Trochalopteron morrisonianum），又名金翼白眉或臺灣噪眉，臺灣話稱四眉（sì-bâi），是圓翅噪鶥屬的一种，分布于臺灣。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。 金翼白眉的模式產地位於玉山，這也是其種名「morrisonianum」的由來。（Mou…

relations.subject: 玉山噪鹛
relations.evidence: It can enter open areas by roadsides and in forest clearings. In the Yushan National Park, it was more abundant in mixed coniferous forest than in grassland, pine woodland, or spruce forest; along with Taiwan fulvetta (Fulvetta formosana) and Taiwan yuhina (Yuhina brunneiceps), it was a dominant species in that habitat.<ref name="Ding et al
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 玉山噪鹛
relations.evidence: Although its population is believed to be decreasing because of habitat destruction and fragmentation, it is not considered a vulnerable species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
